creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port is not broken. You must update _entire_ port that is
required to build this port.

1) cvsup ports-all
2) cd /usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade && make install clean
3) portupgrade -CrN guile-gnome

and you should be able to build guile-gnome.

-- 
FUJISHIMA Satsuki
